ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate接受0到125之间的正整数，不支持强制帧率高于125 fps

ast.name: error
ast.target: 解析前置元数据时出错：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Canvas element has null width or height. Please provide valid values via the `style` prop in order to correctly render it.
ast.target: Canvas元素的宽度或高度为空。请通过`style`属性提供有效值以正确渲染它。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Image should receive either a "src" or "source" prop
ast.target: Image 应接收 \"src\" 或 \"source\" 属性

ast.source: You should pass a valid document to BlobProvider
ast.target: 您应向 BlobProvider 传递有效的文档
